news.title: Ral obbligatoria negli annunci di lavoro: ci sarà spazio per negoziare il salario

Un cambiamento forte per un mercato del lavoro

news.title: Power outages hit France as it records hottest day since measurements began
news.summary: France has recorded it hottest day since records began in 1947, its national weather agency says, breaking a record set on Tuesday.

news.title: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
news.summary: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

news.title: French woman allegedly held captive by husband for 12 years rescued in Pakistan
news.summary: Yasmina alleges she was held along with her five children, and they were all cut off from the outside world.

news.title: Colombia's left-wing presidential candidate concedes defeat
news.summary: Senator Iván Cepeda was beaten by right-wing businessman Abelardo de la Espriella by less than a percentage point.

news.title: Kenya to charge students with murder over deadly school fire
news.summary: Sixteen pupils, aged between 15 and 18, died when a fire broke out in a dormitory at Utumishi Girls' School last month.

news.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
news.summary: Experts say Trump is likely to ignore it, but that even though it carries little power, it is politically significant.

news.title: Germany rail network briefly halted nationwide due to IT malfunction
news.summary: Rail company Deutsche Bahn had to pause train services across the country for more than two-and-a-half hours.

news.title: Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba sues US government over defence blacklist
news.summary: It is suing the US defence department after it was added to a list of firms with ties to the Chinese military.
